speaker: speaker1
text: It's especially cold when the wind is blowing .

speaker: speaker2
text: Why don't you wear a scarf ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What can wearing one do for me ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You're cold because the wind is blowing into your open collar . It's not because your jacket isn't thick enough .

speaker: speaker1
text: So wearing a scarf helps your body to stay warm inside your jacket .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . That's the secret to wearing a thin jacket .

speaker: speaker1
text: You know , sometimes I can't feel my ears and fingers .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'll lend you my gloves and earmuffs until you get your own .
